reasoning_content:
The user wants a JSON representation of the layout of the provided image, specifically focusing on bounding boxes for the text elements.

1.  **Identify the main components:**
    *   Header: Logo, Part Number, Title.
    *   Table: "Table 1. Pin function list" with columns QFN, CSP, Name, Type, Description, Typical connection.
    *   Footer: Document ID, Page number.

2.  **Process Header:**
    *   Logo: Top left.
    *   "STUSB4500": Top right.
    *   "Pinout": Top right, below part number.

3.  **Process Table:**
    *   Iterate through each row.
    *   Row 1 (Header): QFN, CSP, Name, Type, Description, Typical connection.
    *   Row 2 (Data): 1, B4, CC1DB, HV AIO, Dead battery enable on CC1 pin, To CC1 pin if used or ground.
    *   Row 3 (Data): 2, B5, CC1, HV AIO, Type-C configuration channel 1, To Type-C receptacle A5.
    *   Row 4 (Data): 3, B3, C3, NC, -, Floating.
    *   Row 5 (Data): 4, C5, CC2, HV AIO, Type-C configuration channel 2, To Type-C receptacle B5.
    *   Row 6 (Data): 5, C4, CC2DB, HV AIO, Dead battery enable on CC2 pin, To CC2 pin if used or ground.
    *   Row 7 (Data): 6, D4, RESET, DI, Reset input, active high, From system.
    *   Row 8 (Data): 7, D5, SCL, DI, I²C clock input, To I²C master, ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 9 (Data): 8, E5, SDA, DI/OD, I²C data input/output, active low open drain, To I²C master, ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 10 (Data): 9, E4, DISCH, HV AI/OD, Internal discharge path or external discharge path enable, active low open drain, From power system (internal path) or to the discharge path switch (external path), ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 11 (Data): 10, E3, GND, GND, Ground, Ground.
    *   Row 12 (Data): 11, E2, ATTACH, OD, Attachment detection, active low open drain, To MCU if any, ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 13 (Data): 12, D3, ADDR0, DI, I²C device address setting, Static, to ground or ext. pull-up for address selection, to ground if no connection to MCU.
    *   Row 14 (Data): 13, D2, ADDR1, DI, I²C device address setting, Static, to ground or ext. pull-up for address selection, to ground if no connection to MCU.
    *   Row 15 (Data): 14, E1, POWER_OK3, OD, Power contract flag, active low open drain, To power system, ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 16 (Data): 15, D1, GPIO, OD, General purpose output, active low open drain, To system, ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 17 (Data): 16, C1, VBUS_EN_SNK, HV OD, VBUS sink power path enable, active low open drain, To power switch or to power system, ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 18 (Data): 17, C2, A_B_SIDE, OD, Cable orientation, active low open drain, USB super speed MUX select, ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 19 (Data): 18, A1, VBUS_VS_DISCH, HV AI, VBUS voltage monitoring and discharge path, From VBUS, receptacle side.
    *   Row 20 (Data): 19, B2, ALERT, OD, I²C interrupt, active low open drain, To I²C master, ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 21 (Data): 20, A2, POWER_OK2, HV OD, Power contract flag, active low open drain, To power switch or to power system, ext. pull-up.
    *   Row 22 (Data): 21, A3, VREG_1V2, PWR, 1.2 V internal regulator output, 1 µF typ. decoupling capacitor.
    *   Row 23 (Data): 22, B1, VSYS, PWR, Power supply from system, From power system, connect to ground if not used.
    *   Row 24 (Data): 23, A4, VREG_2V7, PWR, 2.7 V internal regulator output, 1 µF typ. decoupling capacitor.
    *   Row 25 (Data): 24, A5, VDD, HV PWR, Power supply from USB power line, From VBUS, receptacle side.
    *   Row 26 (Data): EP, -, EP, GND, Exposed pad is connected to ground, To ground.

4.  **Process Footer:**
    *   "DS12499 - Rev 8": Bottom left.
    *   "page 4/42": Bottom right.

5.  **Construct JSON:** Assemble the identified elements with their corresponding bounding boxes.
